title: cacalia immunis
intro: Cacalia immunis, also known as White Horehound or Barren Horehound, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Cacalia immunis has been used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Cacalia immunis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
